title: Turkish-Style Stuffed Eggplant
description: A flavorful and aromatic eggplant dish filled with a savory mixture of meat and spices, inspired by Turkish cuisine.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together rice, meat, parsley, salt, and pepper.
Spoon the mixture into each eggplant slice, dividing it evenly.
Place the stuffed eggplant slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with olive oil and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
